mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cart (quantity, user_id, spu_id, sku_id,is_deleted,status)
VALUES (#{quantity}, #{userId}, #{spuId}, #{skuId},0,0)
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE cart SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.spu_id, c.sku_id, c.user_id, c.quantity, sku.price, spu.name FROM cart c LEFT JOIN dish_spu spu ON spu.id = c.spu_id LEFT JOIN dish_sku sku ON sku.id = c.sku_id
c.user_id = #{userId} and c.is_deleted = 0
AND spu.merchant_id = #{merchantId}
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id,c.spu_id,c.sku_id,c.user_id, c.quantity,sku.price as price, sku.spu_id,spu.name FROM cart c LEFT JOIN dish_spu spu ON spu.id=c.spu_id LEFT JOIN dish_sku sku ON sku.id=c.sku_id WHERE c.user_id=#{userId} and c.sku_id=#{skuId} AND c.is_deleted = 0

SELECT c.id, c.spu_id, c.sku_id, c.user_id, c.quantity, sku.price, spu.name FROM cart c LEFT JOIN dish_spu spu ON spu.id = c.spu_id LEFT JOIN dish_sku sku ON sku.id = c.sku_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND spu.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 /*SELECT c.*, s.name AS spu_name, s.image AS spu_image FROM cart c INNER JOIN dish_spu s ON c.spu_id = s.id WHERE s.merchant_id = #{merchantId} -- 过滤商家ID AND c.user_id = #{userId} -- 过滤用户ID AND c.is_deleted = 0 -- 确保不是逻辑删除的数据 AND c.status = 0; -- 0表示未下单（根据你的备注）*/

SELECT c.id, c.quantity, c.user_id, c.spu_id, c.sku_id, -- 通过嵌套子查询获取菜品名和图片（如果不希望用 JOIN） (SELECT name FROM dish_spu WHERE id = c.spu_id) as name, (SELECT image FROM dish_spu WHERE id = c.spu_id) as image, -- 价格通常在 SKU 表，也可以这样嵌套 (SELECT price FROM dish_sku WHERE id = c.sku_id) as price FROM cart c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status = 0 AND c.spu_id IN ( SELECT id FROM dish_spu WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} ) ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE cart
quantity = #{quantity},
WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
